stats.fact: A2A protocol was originally developed by Google and is now donated to the Linux Foundation, making it a vendor-neutral open standard
A2A enables connecting agents built on different platforms (LangGraph, CrewAI, Semantic Kernel, custom solutions) into composite AI systems
85% of developers regularly use AI tools in 2026, driving the need for agent interoperability standards like A2A
CrewAI A2A integration supports Bearer tokens, OAuth2, API keys, and HTTP authentication for secure cross-agent communication
OpenAgents framework natively supports both MCP and A2A protocols for agent interoperability at scale
